error: php2cpg binary missing from Joern 4.0.532 distribution — frontends/php2cpg/ directory absent. joern-parse delegates to the same missing binary. Distribution at tools/joern/joern-cli/ was downloaded without PHP frontend.
action_needed: Download php2cpg frontend separately from Joern GitHub release assets for v4.0.532

resolution: php2cpg frontend was in joern-cli.zip but extracted to wrong directory (tools/joern-cli/ instead of tools/joern/joern-cli/). Copied frontends/php2cpg/ into installed location. CPG build now running.

error: docker compose exec session killed when client disconnected mid-analysis at 11640/20047 files. Output file received only stderr progress, no JSON.
resolution: Re-running on host PHP 8.4 directly to avoid session dependency.

error: Crashed with amphp UnhandledFutureError in parallel worker pool (ContextWorkerPool) during analysis phase with --threads=8. PHP 8.4 on macOS. Exit code 1, no JSON output.
resolution: Re-running with --threads=1 to bypass amphp worker pool entirely.

error: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space. Cause: php2cpg processed entire source root including vendor/ (thousands of files). Default -Xmx12288m insufficient or not applied.
resolution: Re-running with source root limited to app/ lib/ setup/ only. Using a temporary merged source dir to avoid multi-dir limitation.
CPG built successfully. 77MB binary at joern_cpg/magento_app.bin. Scope: app/+lib/+setup/src only (vendor excluded). Warnings: closure ref resolution (non-fatal). Running taint queries now.

error: Script used 'import overflowdb.traversal._' which was removed in Joern 4.x (migrated to flatgraph). Also ambiguous macroRW/write references from the bad import cascading. Exit code 1.
resolution: Removed overflowdb import, qualified uwrite alias for upickle.default.write, rewrote with Joern 4.x compatible API. Re-running.

Fixed two issues: (1) removed overflowdb.traversal import incompatible with Joern 4.x flatgraph; (2) traversals were consumed by .size call before reachableByFlows — fixed by using def (lazy method) instead of val for sources/sinks. Result: 72 flows found across 391KB JSON.

error: Crashed at 24% (4700/19105) with InvalidArgumentException: Could not get class storage for magento\catalog\api\data\productextensioninterface. Generated extension interfaces (in generated/) not scanned — Psalm cannot resolve Magento DI-generated types.
resolution: Added generated/ to projectFiles (scan for type resolution) while keeping it in ignoreFiles (suppress error reporting). Re-running.
